channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker

item.title: Grey Market: India is ageing faster than its care systems can keep up. A new wave of startups is trying to bridge that gap

item.title: WHOOP raises $575m at $10.1bn valuation, signals IPO ahead
item.description: In short: WHOOP has raised $575 million in a Series G round that values the screenless health wearable company at $10.1 billion — nearly three times its 2021 valuation. Backed by sovereign wealth funds, leading medical institutions, and a roster of celebrity …

item.title: Iranian missile blitz takes down AWS data centers in Bahrain and Dubai — Amazon declares “hard down” status for multiple zones

item.title: GPT-5.4 Pro jumps to 150 IQ on MESNA Norway test as OpenAI breaks its own record
item.description: OpenAI’s latest GPT-5.4 Pro model has now achieved an IQ score higher than 99.96% of all human beings, giving markets a fresh signal that AI capability gains are starting to outpace the usual product-cycle noise. OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 Pro touches 150 on public IQ … [OpenAI, ServiceNow]
